text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You’ve been approved as a moderator. Please take a moment to review the community guidelines and mod handbook, then jump in when you’re ready.
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You’ve been approved as an event_helper. Please review the event guidelines and coordinator notes, and thanks for pitching in.
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You’ve been approved as a mentor. Please check the mentoring guidelines and intro resources, and we’re glad to have you here.
